author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone
What to Expect from Star Atlas in 2025,Happy Monday everyone! We hosted an Atlas Brew last week that covered some of the updates, releases, events and more that you can expect in 2025. Here's a recap:

Star Atlas Game:  
A new patch is dropping soon, focusing on bug fixes and polishing our December update,Progress and release on Surge/Gunplay, with completed Arena maps,Fleet Command reaching parity with SAGE Labs,C4 in SAGE/Fleet Command (Combat, Claim Stakes, Crafting Habs, Council Rank),Dedicated multiplayer servers, anti cheat and time-based progression,
Fleet Rentals:  
Rent or rent out Star Atlas spaceships,Coming soon,
Atlas Locker:  
Exciting updates are coming to enhance the benefits of locking your ATLAS,
Hackathons:  
Looking at doing more hackathons throughout the year,
Events:  
We're stepping up our event game with a bigger focus on making them better and more entertaining,Breakpoint and Impact Summit,Community Week,
Apollo  
We discussed the possibility of Apollo, a private version of Solana, built for Star Atlas that can help combat network congestion and fees. You can read CEO Michael Wagner's announcement about Apollo, fees and congestion here: CLICK HERE,
Star Atlas DAO:  
Ecosystem fund and the DAO's council is live RIGHT NOW for your ideas,New council elections,
 | I also created a video that talks about the above and why it's so exciting. Check it out here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GpGbzqEIovI
